## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First calibration article (Florida Registered Agent) ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Content OS and style guide established to inform future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [SEO improvements implemented, resulting in 4% increase; image compression still needed](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Discussed potential content syndication strategies and imagery for articles](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration and Style Guide

  - [Florida Registered Agent article completed as first calibration piece](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Style guide created based on existing content, emphasizing plain language and direct tone](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Mike to review and provide detailed feedback using Google Docs' suggest mode](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Content OS set up in Airtable to track article progress and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Next steps include revising the calibration article and preparing 10 articles for the following week](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Team to use Webflow for content staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### SEO Improvements

  - [4% increase in SEO score from recent hygiene updates](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Image compression still needed; Carrie to handle using Webflow's built-in tools](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Discussed potential use of Stacker for content syndication, but decided to wait and focus on building content library first](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Article Imagery

  - [Currently limited use of visuals in articles](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Recommendation: Include 1-2 images per article to break up text and improve readability](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Team to consider standardizing image approach and potentially using AI-generated images](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

### Webflow CMS Walkthrough

  - [Mike provided overview of Webflow CMS structure and content management process](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Team to start using Webflow for content staging after initial calibration in Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review and provide detailed feedback on Florida Registered Agent article](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Carrie to compress existing images using Webflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Team to prepare at least one article for publication and have several more ready for review by next week](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Carrie to consider and propose strategy for article imagery](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Team to standardize title capitalization to sentence case across articles](https://fathom.video/share/aXs6rLjj8ja9xcFTsrLveNftZZyN9qPR?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
